merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a static wide view of a gothic circular meeting room that transitions from a partial gathering to a complete assembly of robed figures. It begins with several figures in dark robes seated around a large circular wooden table, surrounded by blue walls, ornate chandeliers, and tall arched stained glass windows. As the scene unfolds, two additional robed figures enter from the left foreground and walk toward the table to fill the remaining empty seats. The camera remains steady as these newcomers join the group, shifting the composition from a sparse arrangement to a full circle of attendees. The shot finally settles into a still state, emphasizing the unchanging gothic architecture and the solemn atmosphere of the completed meeting.
